Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KING SECURITY SERVICES, INC.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, on both causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Alina Laguna is GRANTED without leave to amend as to both causes of action. No opposition filed. Order is signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
